versions.version_description: This is with Capo on 2nd, not too high and not too low, like other versions

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: In Hell Ill Be In Good Company

recommended.version_description: Chords for the whole song / based on "Live in a Volcano" / https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9WIU5NN1Q0g.

performance.name: Live in a Volcano
performance.comment: Kaleo shot a live performance of the song inside Þríhnúkagígur volcano in Iceland. It's the only volcano in the world you can explore. It hasn't errupted in about 4,000 years.

recommended.version_description: This specific tab is based off the studio recorded version.

content:
"Can't Feel My Face"
by the Weeknd.

Standard Tuning
Capo 5


[Verse]

[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]                            [ch]C[/ch]
And I know she'll be the death of me, at least we'll both be numb[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]
And she'll always get the best of me, the worst is yet to come[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]                              [ch]C[/ch]
But at least we'll both be beautiful and stay forever young[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]
This I know, (yeah) this I know[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab]                    [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
She told me, "Don't worry about it"[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Em[/ch]
She told me, "Don't worry no more"[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
We both knew we can't go without it[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Em[/ch]
She told me you'll never be in love-oh-oh, woo oh[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                  [ch]C[/ch]
I can't feel my face when I'm with you[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]
But I love it, but I love it, oh[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                  [ch]C[/ch]
I can't feel my face when I'm with you[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]
But I love it, but I love it, oh[/tab]


[Verse]

[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]                                 [ch]C[/ch]
And I know she'll be the death of me, at least we'll both be numb[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]
And she'll always get the best of me, the worst is yet to come[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]C[/ch]
All the misery was necessary when we're deep in love[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]
Yes I know (yes I know), yeah, I know[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab]                    [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
She told me, "Don't worry about it"[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Em[/ch]
She told me, "Don't worry no more"[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
We both knew we can't go without it[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Em[/ch]
She told me you'll never be in love-oh-oh, woo oh[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                  [ch]C[/ch]
I can't feel my face when I'm with you[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]
But I love it, but I love it, oh[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                  [ch]C[/ch]
I can't feel my face when I'm with you[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]
But I love it, but I love it, oh[/tab]


[Outro]

[tab][ch]D[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]
(fade out)[/tab]
